entities.name: Medium-Specific Baselines
entities.context: Framework for calibrating communication tone/formality by channel

entities.name: Email
entities.context: Communication medium with defined formality baseline ranges (2.0-2.5 default)

entities.name: Cold Outreach
entities.context: Initial contact communication requiring lower formality baseline (1.5-2.0)

entities.name: Rapport
entities.context: Built relationship trust that influences communication calibration

entities.name: Repeat Collaborators
entities.context: Ongoing working relationships that warrant higher formality/intimacy (3.0)

relationships.context: Email has defined baseline ranges within the medium-specific framework
Cold outreach lowers email baseline to 1.5-2.0 until rapport builds
Built rapport allows baseline to rise toward 3.0
Repeat collaboration raises email baseline to 3.0
